description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly domed top. The can features a metallic gray background adorned with numerous small, realistic condensation droplets, giving it a cold and refreshing appearance. Large, bold, stylized yellow and red text is prominently displayed vertically along the side, partially visible in some views. The top of the can is a darker metallic color and includes a classic pull tab opening mechanism. The surface of the can is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the condensation effect. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or gatherings.
description: A metallic gray aluminum beer can with condensation droplets and bold, stylized yellow-red text. The can has a glossy finish and a classic pull tab top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the can's main label with large, bold yellow-red text and visible condensation droplets.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can, showing mostly the metallic gray surface with condensation and the pull tab top.
description_view_2: The side view displays the can's smooth, glossy surface with condensation droplets and minimal visible text.
description_view_3: This angled view reveals part of the label's text and the condensation, with the pull tab top clearly visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features large, bold, vertically oriented yellow and red text on a metallic gray background. The design is accented by realistic condensation droplets, giving a cold and refreshing look.
